name_cn:
Genuine leather
Same style as Zeng Li's Loewe Embroidered Tote
Model 3085, Large Size 32-18-12
Classic Calfskin Anagram Tote Handbag
Versatile and spacious Tote bag made of jacquard canvas with calfskin. Features a large Anagram pattern on the front. Leather top handle or shorter hand-woven handle.
Carry over shoulder or with top handle
Calfskin strap closure
Internal slip pocket
Calfskin lining
Anagram embossed
